Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** construction of monoidal heterogeneous substitution systems from arbitrary final coalgebras
   and from initial algebras arising from iteration in omega-cocontinuous functors

authors: Ralph Matthes, Kobe Wullaert, 2023

Note: the name of the file still refers to GHSS although it would more appropriately be MHSS after the renaming from "generalized" to "monoidal" done in July 2023.

*)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCoalgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.coslicecat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Chains.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Adamek.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.OmegaCocontFunctors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.CategoriesOfMonoids.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.Actegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.ConstructionOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.MorphismsOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.CoproductsInActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Examples.MonoidalPointedObjects.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SigmaMonoids.

Local Open Scope cat.

Import BifunctorNotations.
Import MonoidalNotations.

Section FixTheContext.

  Context {V : category} {Mon_V : monoidal V}
          {H : V ⟶ V} (θ : pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H).

  Let PtdV : category := GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V.
  Let Mon_PtdV : monoidal PtdV := GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V.
  Let Act : actegory Mon_PtdV V:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V.

  Context  (CP : BinCoproducts V) (δ : actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act).

  Let Const_plus_H (v : V) : functor V V := GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP v.

  Definition I_H : functor V V := Const_plus_H I_{Mon_V}.

Section FinalCoalgebraToMHSS.

  Context (νH : coalgebra_ob I_H)
          (isTerminalνH : isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH).

  Let t : V := pr1 νH.
  Let out : t --> I_H t := pr2 νH.
  Let out_z_iso : z_iso t (I_H t) := finalcoalgebra_z_iso _ I_H νH isTerminalνH.
  Let out_inv : I_H t --> t := inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, I_H (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) ⟧

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, I_H (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) ⟧

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} I_H t, I_H (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V
⟦ CP
    (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t))
    (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z (H t)),
I_H (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V
⟦ CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
    (H
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} t)),
I_H (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) ⟧

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V
⟦ Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)
    (CP
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} t) t),
I_H (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) ⟧

    exact (BinCoproductArrow (CP _ _) (f · out · #I_H (BinCoproductIn2 (CP _ _))) (BinCoproductIn2 _)).
  Defined.

  (** an alternative route through completely iterative algebras *)

      apply BinCoproductIn2.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

⟦ H
    (Z
     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)

           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
              Mon_V)} t), CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t ⟧
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
V
⟦ CP ?Goal
    (H
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} t)),
CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t ⟧

      apply BinCoproductIn1.
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
final_coalg_to_mhss_step_term f =
CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.ϕ_for_cia CP I_H νH
  isTerminalνH (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
final_coalg_to_mhss_step_term f =
CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.ϕ_for_cia CP I_H νH
  isTerminalνH (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t) t)))
             (f · out
              · # I_H
                  (BinCoproductIn2
                     (CP
                        (Z
                         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                  Mon_V)
                               (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                  Mon_V)
                               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                  Mon_V)} t) t)))
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t))
                   (H
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t))))))) =
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (pr1_category
                (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
             (H
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t)))
          (f
           · BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                   (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                (H
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t)))
           · BinCoproductIn1
               (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (# I_H
       (BinCoproductIn1
          (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
               (alg_carrier I_H
                  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                     I_H νH isTerminalνH)))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t) t)))
             (f
              · (out
                 · # I_H
                     (BinCoproductIn2
                        (CP
                           (Z
                            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                  Mon_V
                                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                     Mon_V)} t) t))))
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t))
                   (H
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t))))))) =
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · (BinCoproductArrow
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           (f
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CP
                 (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                    (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                 (H
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t)))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                (alg_carrier I_H
                   (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                      I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
             (# I_H
                (BinCoproductIn1
                   (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
                      (alg_carrier I_H
                         (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                            I_H νH isTerminalνH)))))
             (coalg_map I_H νH
              · # I_H
                  (BinCoproductIn2
                     (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
                        (alg_carrier I_H
                           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                              I_H νH isTerminalνH))))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f
     · (out
        · # I_H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP
                  (Z
                   ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                         (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                            Mon_V)
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)
                         (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                            Mon_V)} t) t))))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t)))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (# I_H
       (BinCoproductIn1
          (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
               (alg_carrier I_H
                  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                     I_H νH isTerminalνH)))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# (BinCoproduct_of_functors V V CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) H)
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f
     · (out
        · # I_H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP
                  (Z
                   ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                         (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                            Mon_V)
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)
                         (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                            Mon_V)} t) t))))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t)))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (# I_H
       (BinCoproductIn1
          (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)
               (alg_carrier I_H
                  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                     I_H νH isTerminalνH)))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) H
  (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)
  (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z) (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
    (f
     · (out
        · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H t
            (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
       (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
       (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductIn1
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
         (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
         (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
         (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
            (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
     (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
  (# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z) (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
    (f
     · (out
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
               (H t))
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
               (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
            (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
     (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
  (# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z) (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
    (f
     · (out
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
               (H t))
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
               (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
            (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) 
       (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
     (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
  (# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z) (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
    (f
     · (out
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
               (H t))
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
               (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
            (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
?b
 apply precompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
   · (f
      · (out
         · BinCoproductOfArrows V
             (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
                (H t))
             (CP
                (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                   (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
                (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
             (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
             (# H
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))))))
  (# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
   · (f
      · (out
         · BinCoproductOfArrows V
             (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
                (H t))
             (CP
                (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                   (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
                (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
             (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
             (# H
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))))))
  (# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
             (H
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
       (coalg_map I_H νH
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
               (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
               (H
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
             (H
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
       (coalg_map I_H νH
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
               (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
               (H
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· (f
   · (out
      · BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
             (H t))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
             (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))))) =
f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) 
       (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· (f
   · (out
      · BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
             (H t))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
             (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))))) =
f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
identity (pr1 Z)
· (f
   · (out
      · BinCoproductOfArrows V (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t))
          (CP I_{ Mon_V}
             (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
          (identity I_{ Mon_V})
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))))) =
f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP I_{ Mon_V}
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (identity I_{ Mon_V})
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP I_{ Mon_V}
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (identity I_{ Mon_V})
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
f
· (out
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t))
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
       (identity I_{ Mon_V})
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP I_{ Mon_V}
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (identity I_{ Mon_V})
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP I_{ Mon_V}
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (identity I_{ Mon_V})
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

H: V ⟶ V

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
f
· (out
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t))
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
       (identity I_{ Mon_V})
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))) =
f
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP I_{ Mon_V}
             (H
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (identity I_{ Mon_V})
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
       (coalg_map I_H νH
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (CP I_{ Mon_V}
               (H
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (identity I_{ Mon_V})
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
out
· BinCoproductOfArrows V (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t))
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
    (identity I_{ Mon_V})
    (# H (BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP I_{ Mon_V}
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (identity I_{ Mon_V})
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP I_{ Mon_V}
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (identity I_{ Mon_V})
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
out
· BinCoproductOfArrows V (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t))
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t)))
    (identity I_{ Mon_V})
    (# H (BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))) =
coalg_map I_H νH
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
    (CP I_{ Mon_V}
       (H
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
    (identity I_{ Mon_V})
    (# H
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))

      apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H

t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
