f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) 
       (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (H
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
       (# H
          (BinCoproductIn1
             (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
    (coalg_map I_H νH
     · BinCoproductOfArrows V
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
            (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
         (CP
            (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (H
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
         (# H
            (BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
             (H
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
          (# H
             (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                   (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))))
       (coalg_map I_H νH
        · BinCoproductOfArrows V
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
               (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
            (CP
               (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
               (H
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
            (# H
               (BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
                     (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))))

           
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
       (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (H
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V})
       (BinCoproductIn1
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))
    (# H
       (BinCoproductIn1
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))

           apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
# H (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t))) =
# H
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (H
          (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.
  (** This clarifies that in the proof below, primitive corecursion can be replaced by only
      exploiting that [out_inv] is a completely iterative algebra (cia), see the alternative
      proof further below. The lemma itself is not used in the sequel. *)

  Let η : I_{Mon_V} --> t := BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv.
  Let τ : H t --> t := BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ = out_inv

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ = out_inv

    apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductArrowEta.
  Qed.

  Local Definition ϕ {Z : PtdV} (f : pr1 Z --> t)
    := final_coalg_to_mhss_step_term f.
  Local Definition Corec_ϕ {Z : PtdV} (f : pr1 Z --> t)
    := primitive_corecursion CP isTerminalνH (x :=  Z ⊗_{Act} t) (ϕ f).

  (** a hand-crafted auxiliary lemma *)
  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (Const_plus_H x) f
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
  (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
· # (Const_plus_H y) f

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

?b =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))) = ?b

νH: coalgebra_ob I_H

x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)))) = 
?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))) = ?t2

        apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

Mon_V: monoidal V

fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g = ?b

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧

x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g =
g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm · # (Const_plus_H y) f

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b = g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm · # (Const_plus_H y) f

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?t1 = # (Const_plus_H y) fm · # (Const_plus_H y) f

           apply functor_comp. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g =
g · # (Const_plus_H y) (fm · f)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g =
g · # (Const_plus_H y) (identity w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g =
g · identity (Const_plus_H y w)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# (constant_functor V V x) f · g = g

      apply id_left.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (# (Const_plus_H x) f
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)))) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (# (Const_plus_H x) f
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)))) = 
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

Mon_V: monoidal V

θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· # (Const_plus_H x) f = ?f'

        apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H

t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)))) = 
?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x w) (H w))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H w)) g
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))) = ?t2

        apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
     (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
   · # (Const_plus_H y) f)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
    (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))
· # (Const_plus_H y) f

           
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?f =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V x v) (H v))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP x (H v))
    (g · # (Const_plus_H y) fm)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v)))

           apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)) =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v))
· # (Const_plus_H y) f

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v))
· # (Const_plus_H y) f

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (constant_functor V V y v) (H v))
· # (Const_plus_H y) f
 apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
x, y, v, w: V
f: V ⟦ v, w ⟧
fm: V ⟦ w, v ⟧
g: V ⟦ x, Const_plus_H y w ⟧
fmf: fm · f = identity w
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w)) =
# H f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (constant_functor V V y w) (H w))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP (ϕ f)
  h
≃ mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP (ϕ f)
  h
≃ mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP (ϕ f)
  h
→ mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
→ primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP
    (ϕ f) h

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP
     (ϕ f) h)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula
  CP (ϕ f) h
mbracket_property_single Mon_V H θ t η τ CP (pr2 Z) f
  h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula
  CP (ϕ f) h
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ · h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h · pr2 νH =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow
       (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) (pr1 νH)) h
       (identity (pr1 νH)))
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ · h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h · out =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t)
       h (identity t))
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ · h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)

            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t)
       h (identity t))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t)
       h (identity t))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) 
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
