CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t)
       h (identity t))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t)
       h (identity t))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso
h = ?t2

        exact Hcorec. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcorec: h =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t)
       h (identity t))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (ϕ f
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
          (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (ϕ f
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
          (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (BinCoproductIn1
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))
            · BinCoproductArrow
                (CP (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t)))
                (f · out
                 · # I_H
                     (BinCoproductIn2
                        (CP
                           (Z
                            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                  Mon_V
                                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t))
                      (H
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t)))))))
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
          (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (BinCoproductIn1
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))
            · BinCoproductArrow
                (CP (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t)))
                (f · out
                 · # I_H
                     (BinCoproductIn2
                        (CP
                           (Z
                            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                  Mon_V
                                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t))
                      (H
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t)))))))
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
          (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) 
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
              (BinCoproductIn1
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))
            · BinCoproductArrow
                (CP (pr1 Z)
                   (H
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t)))
                (f · out
                 · # I_H
                     (BinCoproductIn2
                        (CP
                           (Z
                            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                  Mon_V
                                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                     Mon_V)
                                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t))
                      (H
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t)))))))
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
          (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f · out
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP
               (Z
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = 
?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
   ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
   · Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out) = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out = ?t2

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b = ?t2

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out = ?b
 apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z) (out_inv · out) = ?t2

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· identity (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z (I_H t))
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f · out
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP
               (Z
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action

                    Mon_V)

                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (Z

                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)

    (CP (pr1 Z)

                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)

     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP
               (Z

                         Mon_V)

                          Mon_V)

                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal

                          Mon_V)

                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal

· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h

  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})

  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) 
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP

  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action

                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f · out
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP
               (Z
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = 
?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t) = 
?f'

        apply (pr2 δ). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
identity
  (CP
     (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t))
     (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z (H t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f · out
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP
               (Z
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (pr1 Z)
       (H
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (f · out
     · # I_H
         (BinCoproductIn2
            (CP
               (Z
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} t) t)))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))
          (H
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t)))
        (f
         · (out
            · # I_H
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t) t))))
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CP
              (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))
              (H
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))))
      · (# I_H
           (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
              (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        (pr1 Z)) h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t)))
     (f
      · (out
         · # I_H
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t) t))))
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))))
   · (# I_H
        (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
           (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso)) =
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t)))
     (f
      · (out
         · # I_H
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t) t))))
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))))
   · (# I_H
        (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
           (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso)) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t)))
     (f
      · (out
         · # I_H
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t) t))))
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))))
   · (# I_H
        (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
           (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso)) =
?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f
   · (out
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· (# I_H
     (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
        (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
?t2

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f
   · (out
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductIn2

                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = 
?t2

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f
   · (out
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)

     (CP

                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) = ?f'

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f · out
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)

     (CP
