                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t)) = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?f' =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f · out
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} t) t)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
    (identity t) = identity t

        apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
        (identity t))
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
             (H t))) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
        (identity t))
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
             (H t))) · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) = 
?b

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

     (CP

               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action

               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)

                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)

       (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = ?b

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b = BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))
· inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = ?b
 apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t))
  (f · out · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
   · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t))
  (f · (out · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
   · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

out · inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso = ?t2

        apply (pr122 out_z_iso). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
f · identity t = f

      apply id_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
→ primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP
    (ϕ f) h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
  (pr2 Z) f h
primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP (ϕ f)
  h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: mbracket_property_single Mon_V H θ t η τ CP
  (pr2 Z) f h
primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP (ϕ f)
  h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: mbracket_property_single Mon_V H θ t η τ CP
  (pr2 Z) f h
h · pr2 νH =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) (pr1 νH)) h
       (identity (pr1 νH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
     Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} 
  (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ
· h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
               Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
       H CP (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
h · pr2 νH =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) (pr1 νH)) h
       (identity (pr1 νH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
     Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} 
  (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ
· h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
               Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
       H CP (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
h · out =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

   ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act
         Mon_V}_{l} out_inv · h) =

ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h =
(bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP
   Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) 
   (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
 bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV
   CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) 
   (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} 
         H t))
     (CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
     ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
     (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
   · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
          H CP (pr1 Z)) h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)
h · out =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
h · out =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
h = ?f'

        exact Hmhss. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
· out =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
· out =
ϕ f
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
· out =
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP (pr1 Z)
                (H
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t) t)))
             (f · out
              · # I_H
                  (BinCoproductIn2
                     (CP
                        (Z
                         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                  Mon_V)
                               (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                  Mon_V)
                               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                  Mon_V)} t) t)))
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t))
                   (H
                      (CP
                         (Z
                          ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                                (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                   Mon_V)
                                (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                   Mon_V)
                                (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                   Mon_V)} t) t)))))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
              H CP (pr1 Z)) h
         · (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
            · out)))) =
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
           (BinCoproductIn1
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t))
         · (BinCoproductArrow
              (CP (pr1 Z)
                 (H
                    (CP
                       (Z
                        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                 Mon_V)
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)
                              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                 Mon_V)} t) t)))
              (f
               · (out
                  · # I_H
                      (BinCoproductIn2
                         (CP
                            (Z
                             ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                   Mon_V
                                   (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                      Mon_V)
                                   (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                      Mon_V)} t) t))))
              (BinCoproductIn2
                 (CP
                    (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                       (CP
                          (Z
                           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                 Mon_V
                                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                    Mon_V)
                                 (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                    Mon_V)
                                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                    Mon_V)} t) t))
                    (H
                       (CP
                          (Z
                           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                 Mon_V
                                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                    Mon_V)
                                 (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                    Mon_V)
                                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                    Mon_V)} t) t))))
            · # I_H
                (BinCoproductArrow
                   (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
                   (identity t))))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        (pr1 Z)) h
   · (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t)))
        (f
         · (out
            · # I_H
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t) t))))
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CP
              (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))
              (H
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))))
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
             (identity t))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        (pr1 Z)) h
   · (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out)) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
        (f
         · (out
            · # I_H
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ 
                       reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t))))
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CP
              (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ 
                     reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t))
              (H
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ 
                     reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t))))
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductArrow 
             (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h 
             (identity t))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t))
   · (BinCoproductArrow
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              (CP
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t) t)))
        (f
         · (out
            · # I_H
                (BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t) t))))
        (BinCoproductIn2
           (CP
              (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))
              (H
                 (CP
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t) t))))
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
             (identity t))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?t1 =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f
   · (out
      · # I_H
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t) t))))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

           
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?t1 =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (f · out
   · # I_H
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t) t)))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))
        (H
           (CP
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t) t))))
· # I_H
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))

           
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} t) t)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
    (identity t) = identity t

           apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        (pr1 Z)) h
   · (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductIn1
        (CP
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t) t))
   · (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
        (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
           (identity t))
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
                (H t)))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out) =
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
        (identity t))
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
             (H t))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t) t))
· (# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
     (BinCoproductArrow 
        (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h 
        (identity t))
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) 
       (f · out)
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t)
             (H t))))

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H

Mon_V: monoidal V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

· # (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))
    (BinCoproductArrow (CP (Z ⊗_{ Act} t) t) h
       (identity t))
 apply (functor_comp (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z))).

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

?t1 =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP

            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)

    (identity t)

           apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV

Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· (BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out) =
# (Const_plus_H (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) 
  (f · out)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ · out = ?b
 apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
  (τ · out) =
BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) (f · out)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)))

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H

out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

· (out_inv · out) = ?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
out_inv · out = ?t2

        apply (pr222 out_z_iso). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t))
· identity (I_H t) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

      apply id_right.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
isaprop
  (primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP
     (ϕ f) h)
 apply V.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
isaprop
  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h)
 apply isaprop_mbracket_property_parts.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
