τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
mhss Mon_V H θ

Mon_V: monoidal V

CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
∑ (η : V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧) (τ : V ⟦ H t, t ⟧),
mbracket Mon_V H θ t η τ

mbracket Mon_V H θ t η τ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
mbracket_parts_at Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
(∑ h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, pr1 νH ⟧,
 primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP (ϕ f)
   h)
→ ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
  mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
    mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
      (pr2 Z) f h, ?p (?s y) = y

isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

  (ϕ f) h

  h
 exact Hyp.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
 exact Hyp.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
    mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f
      h,
(λ X : ∑ h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, pr1 νH ⟧,
       primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula CP
         (ϕ f) h,
 (λ (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, pr1 νH ⟧)
  (Hyp : primitive_corecursion_characteristic_formula
           CP (ϕ f) h),
  h,,
  (let X0 :=
     λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
     (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
     pr1
       (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
          f h0) in
   X0 f h Hyp)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X))
  ((λ X : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
          mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
            (pr2 Z) f h,
    (λ (h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧)
     (Hyp : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
              (pr2 Z) f h),
     h,,
     (let X0 :=
        λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
        (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
        pr2
          (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
             f h0) in
      let X1 :=
        λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
        (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
        (y0 : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h0), pr1 (X0 f h0 y0) in
      let X2 :=
        λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
        (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
        (y0 : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h0), pr1 (X1 f h0 y0) in
      X2 f h Hyp)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X)) y) = y
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
h,,
(let X :=
   λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧) (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
   pr1
     (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
        f h) in
 X f h
   (let X0 :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
      pr2
        (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
           f h) in
    let X1 :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
      (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
             (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
    let X2 :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
      (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
             (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
    X2 f h Hyp)) = h,, Hyp

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
pr1
  (h,,
   (let X :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
      pr1
        (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
           f h) in
    X f h
      (let X0 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr2
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       let X1 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
       let X2 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
       X2 f h Hyp))) = pr1 (h,, Hyp)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
transportf
  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f)
  ?p
  (pr2
     (h,,
      (let X :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr1
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       X f h
         (let X0 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
            pr2
              (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
                 f h) in
          let X1 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), 
            pr1 (X0 f h y) in
          let X2 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), 
            pr1 (X1 f h y) in
          X2 f h Hyp)))) = 
pr2 (h,, Hyp)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
pr1
  (h,,
   (let X :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
      pr1
        (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
           f h) in
    X f h
      (let X0 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr2
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       let X1 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
       let X2 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
       X2 f h Hyp))) = pr1 (h,, Hyp)
 apply idpath.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
transportf
  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f)
  (idpath (pr1 (h,, Hyp)))
  (pr2
     (h,,
      (let X :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr1
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       X f h
         (let X0 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
            pr2
              (final_coalg_to_mhss_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
                 f h) in
          let X1 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
          let X2 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
          X2 f h Hyp)))) = pr2 (h,, Hyp)
 apply isaprop_mbracket_property_parts.
  Defined.

  (** the alternative proof through cia *)
  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
≃ mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

Mon_V: monoidal V

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
isaprop
  (cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
     (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
        isTerminalνH)
     (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h)

  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧

  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
mbracket_property_single Mon_V H θ t η τ CP (pr2 Z) f
  h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ · h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH))) 
    (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ · h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))

       (I_H

          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V

· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

Mon_V: monoidal V

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH))) 
    (# I_H h)

       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH))) 
    (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) 
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

Hcia: h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H

       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))

  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH))) 
    (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
h = ?t2

        exact Hcia. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hcia: h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH))) 
    (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
             νH isTerminalνH)))
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP
                (pr1_category
                   (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
                (H
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t)))
             (f
              · BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                   (H
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t)))
              · BinCoproductIn1
                  (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP
                (pr1_category
                   (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
                (H
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t)))
             (f
              · BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                   (H
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t)))
              · BinCoproductIn1
                  (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) 
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · BinCoproductArrow
             (CP
                (pr1_category
                   (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
                (H
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t)))
             (f
              · BinCoproductIn2
                  (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
             (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                   (H
                      (Z
                       ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                             (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                Mon_V)
                             (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                Mon_V)
                             (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                Mon_V)} t)))
              · BinCoproductIn1
                  (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
   ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
   · (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
      · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
         · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
              (CP
                 (pr1_category
                    (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} H t))
              (CP
                 (pr1_category
                    (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
                 (H
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t)))
              ru^{ Mon_V
              }_{ pr1_category
                    (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
              (pr1 θ Z t)
            · (BinCoproductArrow
                 (CP
                    (pr1_category
                       (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V})
                       Z)
                    (H
                       (Z
                        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                 Mon_V)
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)
                              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                 Mon_V)} t)))
                 (f
                  · BinCoproductIn2
                      (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
                 (BinCoproductIn2
                    (CP
                       (constant_functor V V
                          I_{ Mon_V} (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                       (H
                          (Z
                           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                 Mon_V
                                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                    Mon_V)
                                 (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                    Mon_V)
                                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                    Mon_V)} t)))
                  · BinCoproductIn1
                      (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
               · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
                    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                       (alg_carrier I_H
                          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                             I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                    (CP
                       (I_H
                          (alg_carrier I_H
                             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                                I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                       (alg_carrier I_H
                          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                             I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                    (# I_H h)
                    (identity
                       (alg_carrier I_H
                          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                             I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                  · BinCoproductArrow
                      (CP
                         (I_H
                            (alg_carrier I_H
                               (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                                  I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                         (alg_carrier I_H
                            (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                               I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                      (alg_map I_H
                         (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                            I_H νH isTerminalνH))
                      (identity
                         (alg_carrier I_H
                            (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                               I_H νH isTerminalνH))))))))) =
?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· (Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
   · (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
      · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} H t))
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           ru^{ Mon_V
           }_{ pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
           (pr1 θ Z t)
         · (BinCoproductArrow
              (CP
                 (pr1_category
                    (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
                 (H
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t)))
              (f
               · BinCoproductIn2
                   (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
              (BinCoproductIn2
                 (CP
                    (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                       (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                    (H
                       (Z
                        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                                 Mon_V)
                              (monoidal_pointed_objects
                                 Mon_V)
                              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                                 Mon_V)} t)))
               · BinCoproductIn1
                   (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
            · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
                 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                    (alg_carrier I_H
                       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                          I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                 (CP
                    (I_H
                       (alg_carrier I_H
                          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                             I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                    (alg_carrier I_H
                       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                          I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                 (# I_H h)
                 (identity
                    (alg_carrier I_H
                       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                          I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
               · BinCoproductArrow
                   (CP
                      (I_H
                         (alg_carrier I_H
                            (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                               I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                      (alg_carrier I_H
                         (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                            I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                   (alg_map I_H
                      (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                         I_H νH isTerminalνH))
                   (identity
                      (alg_carrier I_H
                         (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                            I_H νH isTerminalνH)))))))) =
?t2

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) = ?t2

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
(pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out = ?b
 apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z) (out_inv · out) = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z) (out_inv · out) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b = ?f'

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
