V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
out_inv · out = ?t2

          apply (pr222 out_z_iso). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z) (identity (I_H t)) =
?f'

        apply (functor_id (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z)).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (identity (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z (I_H t))
   · δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
           ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} H t))
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       ru^{ Mon_V
       }_{ pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
       (pr1 θ Z t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       (f
        · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
             (H
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t)))
        · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
           ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} H t))
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       ru^{ Mon_V
       }_{ pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
       (pr1 θ Z t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       (f
        · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
             (H
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t)))
        · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
           ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} H t))
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       ru^{ Mon_V
       }_{ pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
       (pr1 θ Z t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       (f
        · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
             (H
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t)))
        · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) 
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
           ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} H t))
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       ru^{ Mon_V
       }_{ pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
       (pr1 θ Z t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (pr1_category
             (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
       (f
        · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
       (BinCoproductIn2
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
             (H
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t)))
        · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
   · BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) = ?b

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} (H t)
· δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t) = 
?f'

        apply (pr2 δ). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
identity
  (CP
     (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t))
     (leftwhiskering_functor Act Z (H t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
        ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
       (Z
        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
              (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                 Mon_V)
              (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
              (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                 Mon_V)} H t))
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    ru^{ Mon_V
    }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
    (pr1 θ Z t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
       (H
          (Z
           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                 (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                    Mon_V)
                 (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                 (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                    Mon_V)} t)))
    (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
    (BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
          (H
             (Z
              ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                    (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                    (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                    (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
     · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
       (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
      ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     (Z
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V
  }_{ pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
  (pr1 θ Z t)
· (BinCoproductArrow
     (CP
        (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V})
           Z)
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
     (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
     (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH)))
        (CP
           (I_H
              (alg_carrier I_H
                 (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                    νH isTerminalνH)))
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
        (identity
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH)))
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (I_H
                (alg_carrier I_H
                   (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                      I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_map I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))
          (identity
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH))))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t))) ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        (pr1 Z)) h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
     (CP
        (I_H
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH)))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
     (identity
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
     (CP
        (I_H
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH)))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
     (identity
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))) =
# (BinCoproduct_of_functors V V CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) H) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) (coalg_carrier I_H νH) h)
     (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))) =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) H
  (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
           (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
           (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
        (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
        (# H h)) (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V 
        (pr1 Z) (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
     (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) 
  (# H h) · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
 apply pathsinv0, precompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f) (# H h · τ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f) (# H h · τ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) =
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1

       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP

· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) 
       (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP

       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) 
       (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) = 
# H h · τ

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP

           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow

          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))) =
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

· (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP

          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) = # H h · τ
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))) =
# H h · τ

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧

  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))

             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· (BinCoproductIn1

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)) = ?t2

          apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
        (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
     (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
   · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH) = # H h · τ

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
       (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
· α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH

  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h) =
?f'

          apply BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2.

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
