Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# H h
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
   · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH) = # H h · τ

        apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
→ cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
    (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
       isTerminalνH)
    (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
  (pr2 Z) f h
cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: mbracket_property_single Mon_V H θ t η τ CP
  (pr2 Z) f h
cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: mbracket_property_single Mon_V H θ t η τ CP
  (pr2 Z) f h
h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
     Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} 
  (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} 
  BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) η τ
· h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
               Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
       H CP (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
     Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} 
  (H t)
· (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
  ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
               Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
       H CP (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: actegory_bincoprod_antidistributor
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
     Mon_V) CP
  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V)
  (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) I_{ Mon_V} 
  (H t)
· ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
   ⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act
         Mon_V}_{l} out_inv · h) =
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
     ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
               Mon_V)
            (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
               Mon_V)} H t))
  (CP (pr1 Z)
     (H
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} 
  (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
· # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
       H CP (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ
h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
⊗^{ GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V}_{l} out_inv
· h =
(bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP
   Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) 
   (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
 bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV
   CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) 
   (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
        ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} 
         H t))
     (CP (pr1 Z)
        (H
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
     ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
     (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
   · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
          H CP (pr1 Z)) h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)
h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
h =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
h = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
?b =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) 
    (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
h = ?b
 exact Hmhss. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
Hmhss: h =
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV
      CP Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
      (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly
      Mon_PtdV CP Act δ 
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects
                     Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} 
            H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects
                       Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z}
        (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow 
          (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)) =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)) =
final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · # (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
             H CP (pr1 Z)) h
      · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ)) =
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · BinCoproductArrow
          (CP
             (pr1_category
                (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
             (H
                (Z
                 ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                          Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                          Mon_V)} t)))
          (f
           · BinCoproductIn2
               (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
          (BinCoproductIn2
             (CP
                (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                   (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                (H
                   (Z
                    ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                          (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                             Mon_V)
                          (monoidal_pointed_objects
                             Mon_V)
                          (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                             Mon_V)} t)))
           · BinCoproductIn1
               (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (I_H
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))
    (alg_map I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH))
    (identity
       (alg_carrier I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor Act (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z))
  out_z_iso
· ((bincoprod_functor_lineator_data Mon_PtdV CP Act δ
      (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t),,
    bincoprod_functor_lineator_strongly Mon_PtdV CP
      Act δ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) (I_{ Mon_V},, H t))
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP (pr1 Z)
           (H
              ((pr1 Z,, pr2 Z)
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} (θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t)
      · (# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
              H CP (pr1 Z)) h
         · BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ))) =
Z ⊗^{ Act}_{l} out
· (δ Z (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t)
   · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V})
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} H t))
        (CP
           (pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
           (H
              (Z
               ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                     (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                        Mon_V)
                     (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                     (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                        Mon_V)} t)))
        ru^{ Mon_V
        }_{ pr1_category
              (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z}
        (pr1 θ Z t)
      · (BinCoproductArrow
           (CP
              (pr1_category
                 (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
              (H
                 (Z
                  ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                        (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                           Mon_V)
                        (monoidal_pointed_objects
                           Mon_V)
                        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                           Mon_V)} t)))
           (f
            · BinCoproductIn2
                (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
           (BinCoproductIn2
              (CP
                 (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                    (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                 (H
                    (Z
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} t)))
            · BinCoproductIn1
                (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
         · (BinCoproductOfArrows V
              (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
                 (alg_carrier I_H
                    (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                       I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
              (CP
                 (I_H
                    (alg_carrier I_H
                       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                          I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                 (alg_carrier I_H
                    (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                       I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
              (# I_H h)
              (identity
                 (alg_carrier I_H
                    (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                       I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
            · BinCoproductArrow
                (CP
                   (I_H
                      (alg_carrier I_H
                         (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                            I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                   (alg_carrier I_H
                      (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                         I_H νH isTerminalνH)))
                (alg_map I_H
                   (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                      I_H νH isTerminalνH))
                (identity
                   (alg_carrier I_H
                      (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv
                         I_H νH isTerminalνH)))))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
     (pr1 Z)) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
     (CP
        (I_H
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH)))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
     (identity
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (BinCoproduct_of_functors V V CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) H) h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1_category (coslice_cat_disp V I_{ Mon_V}) Z)
     (H
        (Z
         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
               (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                  Mon_V)
               (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
               (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                  Mon_V)} t)))
  (f · BinCoproductIn2 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (H
           (Z
            ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                     Mon_V)
                  (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                  (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                     Mon_V)} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1 (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP (I_H (Z ⊗_{ Act} t))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
     (CP
        (I_H
           (alg_carrier I_H
              (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                 isTerminalνH)))
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH))) (# I_H h)
     (identity
        (alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (I_H
             (alg_carrier I_H
                (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H
                   νH isTerminalνH)))
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH)))
       (alg_map I_H
          (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
             isTerminalνH))
       (identity
          (alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH))))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) H
  (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) t h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t) (coalg_carrier I_H νH) h)
     (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· (BinCoproductOfArrows V
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
     (BinCoproductOfArrows V
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
           (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
        (CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
              (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
           (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
        (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
        (# H h)) (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) 
       (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) 
       (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductOfArrows V
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (CP (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z) t) (H t))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h) (# H h)
· BinCoproductArrow (CP (pr1 Z) (H t)) f τ = ?b
 apply precompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f) (# H h · τ) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f) (# H h · τ) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
  (f
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f =
f
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# H h · τ =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) 
       (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) 
       (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f =
f
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
           (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
           (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CP
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (BinCoproductOfArrows V
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
             (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
          (CP
             (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
             (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
          (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h)
          (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
       (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
        · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f =
f
· (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
   · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

# (constant_functor V V (pr1 Z)) h · f = f

        apply id_left.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# H h · τ =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
    (BinCoproductOfArrows V
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
          (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
       (CP
          (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
          (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

?t1 =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors_ob V V CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
        (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)) t)

             (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

       (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
     · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)
    (identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH)
     · identity (coalg_carrier I_H νH))

             apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
