τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
       (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) 
    (# H h) · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?b =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
       (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)
· α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
?f =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
· BinCoproductOfArrows V
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t))
       (H (pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t)))
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h) (# H h)

             apply pathsinv0, BinCoproductOfArrowsIn2. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# H h · τ =
# H h
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
       (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
· α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
# H h · τ =
# H h
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (coalg_carrier I_H νH))
        (H (coalg_carrier I_H νH)))
   · α' V I_H νH isTerminalνH)

        apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
isaprop
  (cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
     (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
        isTerminalνH)
     (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h)
 apply V.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: PtdV
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧
isaprop
  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h)
 apply isaprop_mbracket_property_parts.
  Qed.
  (** this proof is a bit shorter and does not need the hand-crafted auxiliary lemma [changing_the_constant_Const_plus_H] *)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
mhss Mon_V H θ

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
∑ (η : V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧) (τ : V ⟦ H t, t ⟧),
mbracket Mon_V H θ t η τ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
∑ τ : V ⟦ H t, t ⟧, mbracket Mon_V H θ t η τ

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧

out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

mbracket Mon_V H θ t η τ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
mbracket_parts_at Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
(∑
 h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
     alg_carrier I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH) ⟧,
 cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
   (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
      isTerminalνH)
   (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h)
→ ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
  mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
(∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
 mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h)
→ ∑
  h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
      alg_carrier I_H
        (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
           isTerminalνH) ⟧,
  cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
    (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
       isTerminalνH)
    (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
    mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
      (pr2 Z) f h, ?p (?s y) = y

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
(∑
 h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
     alg_carrier I_H
       (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
          isTerminalνH) ⟧,
 cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
   (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
      isTerminalνH)
   (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h)
→ ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
  mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
alg_carrier I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH) ⟧
Hyp: cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h

h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
alg_carrier I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH) ⟧

  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
alg_carrier I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH) ⟧
Hyp: cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
  (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
     isTerminalνH)
  (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h
 exact Hyp.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
(∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
 mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h)
→ ∑
  h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
      alg_carrier I_H
        (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
           isTerminalνH) ⟧,
  cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
    (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
       isTerminalνH)
    (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f h
 exact Hyp.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
    mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f
      h,
(λ X : ∑
       h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
           alg_carrier I_H
             (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
                isTerminalνH) ⟧,
       cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
         (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
            isTerminalνH)
         (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h,
 (λ (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t,
         alg_carrier I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH) ⟧)
  (Hyp : cia_characteristic_formula CP I_H
           (CompletelyIterativeAlgebras.Xinv I_H νH
              isTerminalνH)
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism f) h),
  h,,
  (let X0 :=
     λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
     (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
     pr1
       (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
          f h0) in
   X0 f h Hyp)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X))
  ((λ X : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
          mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
            (pr2 Z) f h,
    (λ (h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧)
     (Hyp : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
              (pr2 Z) f h),
     h,,
     (let X0 :=
        λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
        (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
        pr2
          (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
             f h0) in
      let X1 :=
        λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
        (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
        (y0 : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h0), pr1 (X0 f h0 y0) in
      let X2 :=
        λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
        (h0 : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
        (y0 : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h0), pr1 (X1 f h0 y0) in
      X2 f h Hyp)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X)) y) = y
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
h,,
(let X :=
   λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧) (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
   pr1
     (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
        f h) in
 X f h
   (let X0 :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
      pr2
        (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
           f h) in
    let X1 :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
      (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
             (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
    let X2 :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
      (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
             (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
    X2 f h Hyp)) = h,, Hyp

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
pr1
  (h,,
   (let X :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
      pr1
        (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
           f h) in
    X f h
      (let X0 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr2
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       let X1 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
       let X2 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
       X2 f h Hyp))) = pr1 (h,, Hyp)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
transportf
  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f)
  ?p
  (pr2
     (h,,
      (let X :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr1
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       X f h
         (let X0 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
            pr2
              (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
                 f h) in
          let X1 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), 
            pr1 (X0 f h y) in
          let X2 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), 
            pr1 (X1 f h y) in
          X2 f h Hyp)))) = 
pr2 (h,, Hyp)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
pr1
  (h,,
   (let X :=
      λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
      (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
      pr1
        (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
           f h) in
    X f h
      (let X0 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr2
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       let X1 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
       let X2 :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
         (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ
                (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
       X2 f h Hyp))) = pr1 (h,, Hyp)
 apply idpath.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
νH: coalgebra_ob I_H
isTerminalνH: isTerminal (CoAlg_category I_H) νH
t:= pr1 νH: V
out:= pr2 νH: V ⟦ t, I_H t ⟧
out_z_iso:= finalcoalgebra_z_iso V I_H νH isTerminalνH: z_iso t (I_H t)
out_inv:= inv_from_z_iso out_z_iso: V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H t)) · out_inv: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ 
  (pr2 Z) f h
transportf
  (mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η τ (pr2 Z) f)
  (idpath (pr1 (h,, Hyp)))
  (pr2
     (h,,
      (let X :=
         λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
         (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
         pr1
           (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
              f h) in
       X f h
         (let X0 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧),
            pr2
              (final_coalg_to_mhss_equation_morphism_has_equivalent_characteristic_formula
                 f h) in
          let X1 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X0 f h y) in
          let X2 :=
            λ (f : V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧)
            (h : V ⟦ Z ⊗_{ Act} t, t ⟧)
            (y : mbracket_property_parts Mon_V H θ t η
                   τ (pr2 Z) f h), pr1 (X1 f h y) in
          X2 f h Hyp)))) = pr2 (h,, Hyp)
 apply isaprop_mbracket_property_parts.
  Defined.

End FinalCoalgebraToMHSS.

Section InitialAlgebraToMHSS.

  Context (IV : Initial V) (CV : Colims_of_shape nat_graph V) (HH : is_omega_cocont H).

  Let AF : category := FunctorAlg I_H.
  Let chnF : chain V := initChain IV I_H.

  Let t_Initial : Initial AF := colimAlgInitial IV (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H HH I_{Mon_V})  (CV chnF).
  Let t : V := alg_carrier _ (InitialObject t_Initial).
  Let α : I_H t --> t := alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial).

  Let η : constant_functor V V I_{Mon_V} t --> t := BinCoproductIn1 (CP _ _) · α.
  Let τ : H t --> t := BinCoproductIn2 (CP _ _) · α.

  (** a more comfortable presentation of the standard iteration scheme *)


  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα
→ τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα
→ τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V

AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧

Hyp: colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ
η · h = aη

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ
τ · h = # H h · aτ
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (colim_algebra_mor IV
     (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
        CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
     (CV chnF) · h) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
τ · h = # H h · aτ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
τ · h = # H h · aτ

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
τ · h = ?b

 exact Hyp.

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF

  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ) =
# H h · aτ

· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

· colim_algebra_mor IV

   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη

  (CP

        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ) =
?b

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ = 
?t2

        apply precompWithBinCoproductArrow.

Mon_V: monoidal V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h · aη)
    (# H h · aτ) = # H h · aτ

      apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ
η · h = aη

  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (colim_algebra_mor IV

     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)

   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
η · h = ?b
 exact Hyp.

Mon_V: monoidal V

· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,

  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})

BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF)))

· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H

       aτ)

  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ) =
aη

  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV

  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

  (CP

· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ) =

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ) =
?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ = 
?t2

        apply precompWithBinCoproductArrow. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP
       (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
          (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
    (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h · aη)
    (# H h · aτ) = aη

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (colim (CV chnF))))
    (identity I_{ Mon_V} · aη) (# H h · aτ) = aη

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
    (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
     (colim (CV chnF)) av h
   · BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη
       aτ)
BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (colim (CV chnF)))) aη
    (# H h · aτ) = aη

      apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
τ · h = # H h · aτ
→ η · h = aη → pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

aα:= av,,

→ η · h = aη → pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H HH
     I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H HH
     I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
?b =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H HH
     I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
colim_algebra_mor IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H HH
     I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) = ?f'

      apply BinCoproductArrowEta. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF))
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF)) · h =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF)) · h = ?b

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ

  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}

        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF)) · h = ?b
 apply postcompWithBinCoproductArrow.

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV

  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h) =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor V V CP
  (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) H
  (colim (CV chnF)) av h
· BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
