η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
  (BinCoproductIn1
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h)
  (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP
        (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
           (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
   · colim_algebra_mor IV
       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP
          H HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h) =
BinCoproductArrow
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
  (# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h · aη)
  (# H h · aτ)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H
       HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h =
# (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}) h · aη
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
        (colim (CV chnF))) 
     (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H
       HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h = 
# H h · aτ

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductIn1 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H
       HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h =
identity I_{ Mon_V} · aη

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: ∑ y, V ⟦ CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av), y ⟧
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
BinCoproductIn2 (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H (colim (CV chnF))))
· colim_algebra_mor IV
    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF CP H
       HH I_{ Mon_V}) (CV chnF) · h = # H h · aτ
 exact Hyp1.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

Mon_V: monoidal V

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= ?Goal: AF
∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
V
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
(λ x : V, algebra_disp_cat I_H x) ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
V
 exact av.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
(λ x : V, algebra_disp_cat I_H x) av
 exact (BinCoproductArrow (CP _ _) aη aτ).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
AF ⟦ pr1 t_Initial, aα ⟧
→ ∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
(∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη)
→ AF ⟦ pr1 t_Initial, aα ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη,
?p (?s y) = y

Mon_V: monoidal V

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
h: V ⟦ pr11 t_Initial, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα
∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,

h: V ⟦ pr11 t_Initial, pr1 aα ⟧
Hyp: pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα
pr21 t_Initial -->[
h] pr2
     (av,,
      BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ)

      exact Hyp.

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
(∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη)
→ AF ⟦ pr1 t_Initial, aα ⟧
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
AF ⟦ pr1 t_Initial, aα ⟧

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
h: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
Hyp1: τ · h = # H h · aτ
Hyp2: η · h = aη
τ · h = # H h · aτ

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
av: V
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
aτ: V ⟦ H av, av ⟧
aα:= av,,
BinCoproductArrow (CP I_{ Mon_V} (H av)) aη aτ: AF
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧, τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη,
(λ X : AF ⟦ pr1 t_Initial, aα ⟧,
 (λ (h : V ⟦ pr11 t_Initial, pr1 aα ⟧)
  (Hyp : pr21 t_Initial -->[ h] pr2 aα),
  h,, Iteration_I_H_aux1 av aη aτ h Hyp) (pr1 X)
   (pr2 X))
  ((λ X : ∑ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
          τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη,
    (λ (h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧)
     (pr2 : τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη),
     (λ (Hyp1 : τ · h = # H h · aτ)
      (Hyp2 : η · h = aη),
      h,, Iteration_I_H_aux2 av aη aτ h Hyp1 Hyp2)
       (pr1 pr2) (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X))
     y) = y
 abstract (intros [h Hyp]; use total2_paths_f; [ apply idpath | apply isapropdirprod; apply V]).
  Defined.

  Context (initial_annihilates : ∏ (v : V), isInitial V (v ⊗_{Mon_V} (InitialObject IV))).
  Context (left_whiskering_omega_cocont : ∏ (v : V), is_omega_cocont (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v)).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
mhss Mon_V H θ

∑ (η : V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, t ⟧) (τ : V ⟦ H t, t ⟧),

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
∃! h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f = pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
∃! h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f = pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h

is_omega_cocont

     Mon_V v)

                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
(∑

     ⟦ Z
       ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                  ((λ c : V,

     t ⟧,

   Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
(∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH

                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
    ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
    pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
    × θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
      pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h, 
?p (?s y) = y

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH

  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))

  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV

                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
(∑
 h : V
     ⟦ Z
       ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                  ((λ c : V,
                    GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                      H CP c) I_{ Mon_V})
                  (colimAlgInitial IV

   Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V
⟦ Z
  ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
             (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                H CP I_{ Mon_V})
             (colimAlgInitial IV
                (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                   CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                (CV
                   (initChain IV
                      (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), t ⟧
Hyp1: Z
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V
                      I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· h = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f
Hyp2: Z
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V
                      I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· h =
θ Z
  (alg_carrier
     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
        H CP I_{ Mon_V})
     (colimAlgInitial IV
        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
        (CV
           (initChain IV
              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))) · 
# H h · τ
∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f = pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V
⟦ Z
  ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
             (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                H CP I_{ Mon_V})
             (colimAlgInitial IV
                (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                   CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                (CV
                   (initChain IV
                      (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), t ⟧
Hyp1: Z
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V
                      I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· h = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f
Hyp2: Z
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V
                      I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· h =
θ Z
  (alg_carrier
     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
        H CP I_{ Mon_V})
     (colimAlgInitial IV
        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
        (CV
           (initChain IV
              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))) · 
# H h · τ
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f = pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h

      split; apply pathsinv0; assumption.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
(∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
 ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
 pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
 × θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
   pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h)
→ ∑
  h : V
      ⟦ Z
        ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                   ((λ c : V,
                     GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c) I_{ Mon_V})
                   (colimAlgInitial IV
                      (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                         CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                      (CV
                         (initChain IV
                            ((λ c : V,
                              GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                H CP c) I_{ Mon_V})))),
      t ⟧,
  charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
    Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
    (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp1: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
Hyp2: θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
∑
h : V
    ⟦ Z
      ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                 (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                    H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                 (colimAlgInitial IV
                    (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                    (CV
                       (initChain IV
                          (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                             H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH

Hyp2: θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ

      split; apply pathsinv0; assumption.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
∏
y : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
    ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
    pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
    × θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
      pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h,
(λ X : ∑
       h : V
           ⟦ Z
             ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                        ((λ c : V,
                          GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP c) I_{ Mon_V})
                        (colimAlgInitial IV
                           (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                              CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                           (CV
                              (initChain IV
                                 ((λ c : V,
                                   GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP c)
                                    I_{ Mon_V})))), t
           ⟧,
       charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
         Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
         (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h,
 (λ (h : V
         ⟦ Z
           ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                      (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                         H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                      (colimAlgInitial IV
                         (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                            CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                         (CV
                            (initChain IV
                               (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                  H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
         t ⟧)
  (pr2 : charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
           Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} t θ
           τ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h),
  (λ (Hyp1 : Z
             ⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                             (CP
                                (constant_functor V V
                                   I_{ Mon_V}
                                   (alg_carrier
                                      (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                         H CP
                                         I_{ Mon_V})
                                      (colimAlgInitial
                                         IV (...)
                                         (...))))
                                (H
                                   (alg_carrier
                                      (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                         H CP
                                         I_{ Mon_V})
                                      (colimAlgInitial
                                         IV (...)
                                         (...)))))
                           · alg_map
                               (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                  H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                               (pr1
                                  (colimAlgInitial IV
                                     (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                                        CP H HH
                                        I_{ Mon_V})
                                     (CV
                                        (initChain IV
                                           (...))))))
             · h = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
   (Hyp2 : Z
           ⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                           (CP
                              (constant_functor V V
                                 I_{ Mon_V}
                                 (alg_carrier
                                    (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                                    (colimAlgInitial
                                       IV (...) (...))))
                              (H
                                 (alg_carrier
                                    (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                                    (colimAlgInitial
                                       IV (...) (...)))))
                         · alg_map
                             (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                             (pr1
                                (colimAlgInitial IV
                                   (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                                      CP H HH
                                      I_{ Mon_V})
                                   (CV
                                      (initChain IV
                                         (...))))))
           · h =
           θ Z
             (alg_carrier
                (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                   H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                (colimAlgInitial IV
                   (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                      CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                   (CV
                      (initChain IV
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))
           · # H h · τ), h,, ! Hyp1,, ! Hyp2)
    (pr1 pr2) (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X))
  ((λ X : ∑ h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
          ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
          pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
          × θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
            pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h,
    (λ (h : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧)
     (pr2 : ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
            pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
            × θ (pr1 Z,, Preamble.pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
              pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h),
     (λ (Hyp1 : ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
                pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h)
      (Hyp2 : θ (pr1 Z,, Preamble.pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
              pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h),
      h,, ! Hyp1,, ! Hyp2) (pr1 pr2)
       (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X)) y) = y
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
h,, ! (! pr1 Hyp),, ! (! pr2 Hyp) = h,, Hyp

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
pr1 (h,, ! (! pr1 Hyp),, ! (! pr2 Hyp)) =
pr1 (h,, Hyp)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
transportf
  (λ x : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
   ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
   pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · x
   × θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H x · τ =
     pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · x) 
  ?p (pr2 (h,, ! (! pr1 Hyp),, ! (! pr2 Hyp))) =
pr2 (h,, Hyp)

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))

       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h

pr1 (h,, Hyp)
 apply idpath.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
transportf
  (λ x : V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧,
   ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
   pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · x
   × θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H x · τ =
     pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · x)
  (idpath (pr1 (h,, Hyp)))
  (pr2 (h,, ! (! pr1 Hyp),, ! (! pr2 Hyp))) =
pr2 (h,, Hyp)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
