  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
! (! pr1 Hyp),, ! (! pr2 Hyp) = Hyp
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
Z: GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V
f: V ⟦ pr1 Z, t ⟧
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f)
  (initial_annihilates (pr1 Z))
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont (pr1 Z))
  δ: ∃! h : V
       ⟦ Z
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    ((λ 
                      c : V,
                      GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
       t ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act Z CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} t θ τ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f) h
h: V ⟦ pr1 Z ⊗_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
Hyp: ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 Z} · f =
pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h
× θ (pr1 Z,, pr2 Z) t · # H h · τ =
  pr1 Z ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h
pr1 Hyp,, pr2 Hyp = Hyp

        apply idpath.
  Defined.

  Let σ : SigmaMonoid θ := mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss.
  Let μ : pr1 σ ⊗_{Mon_V} pr1 σ --> pr1 σ := pr11 (pr212 σ).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
isInitial (SigmaMonoid θ) σ

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
isInitial (SigmaMonoid θ) σ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
asigma: SigmaMonoid θ
iscontr (SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, asigma ⟧)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_disp_cat_without_sigma_constr θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
iscontr
  (SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ
   ⟧)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: pr1 (SigmaMonoid_disp_cat_without_sigma_constr θ)
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
iscontr
  (SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ
   ⟧)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
iscontr
  (SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ
   ⟧)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
iscontr
  (SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ
   ⟧)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
iscontr
  (SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ
   ⟧)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
(λ cntr : SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ,
          av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧,
 ∏
 t : SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ,
     av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧, 
 t = cntr) ?pr1

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ, av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF

η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
pr2 σ -->[ h] pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
pr12 σ -->[ h] pr12 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
(λ fD : pr12 σ -->[
        h] pr12 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ),
 pr22 σ -->[
 h,, fD] pr22 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) 
  ?pr1

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
(λ fD : pr12 σ -->[
        h] pr12 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ),
 pr22 σ -->[
 h,, fD] pr22 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) 
  ?pr1
 exact tt.

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ

aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
pr12 σ -->[ h] pr12 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: (λ h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
 τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη) 
  (pr11 It_inst)
pr12 σ -->[ h] pr12 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
pr12 σ -->[ h] pr12 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)

pr112 σ -->[
h] pr112 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

av: V

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
pr112 σ -->[
h] pr112 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
 exact (pr1 aux).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
pr212 σ -->[
h] pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
pr2 (monoid_disp_cat Mon_V) (pr1 σ)
  (pr1 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) (pr212 σ)
  (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) h

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V

η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
is_monoid_mor_mult Mon_V (pr212 σ)
  (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) h

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,

left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
is_monoid_mor_unit Mon_V 
  (pr212 σ) (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ))
  h

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr212 σ) · h =
monoid_data_unit Mon_V
  (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ))
 exact (pr2 aux). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

HH: is_omega_cocont H

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF

η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
is_monoid_mor_mult Mon_V (pr212 σ)
  (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) h

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h
· monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
    (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) =
monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V (pr212 σ) · h

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
aux: ∑
_ : τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ,
η · pr11 It_inst = aη
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ = μ · h

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF

α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · pr11 It_inst = # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ
auxη: η · pr11 It_inst = aη
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ = μ · h

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ = μ · h

        (** both sides are identical as unique morphism from the Mendler iteration scheme *)
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ = μ · h

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ = pr11 Mendler_inst

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
pr11 Mendler_inst = μ · h

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av θ
  aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
θ (t,, η)
  (alg_carrier
     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        I_{ Mon_V})
     (colimAlgInitial IV
        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
        (CV
           (initChain IV
              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                 H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))
· # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) · aτ

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h
 apply monoidal_rightunitornat. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V} · ru^{ Mon_V }_{ av}

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V

                     ((λ 
                       c : V,

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial

                       (CV
