                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) = ?b

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

     Mon_V v)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (initial_annihilates t)

                     ((λ 
                       c : V,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?t1 = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ av}

                  apply (pr12 Hμη). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
   · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V (aμ,, aη))

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
· monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · functoronmorphisms2 Mon_V h h =

· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

· h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} av = ?b

                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} h
· h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} av = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} h = ?f'

               apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V t)).

Mon_V: monoidal V

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
# (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V t) (η · h)
· h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} av =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

Mon_V: monoidal V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial

                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
# (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V t) aη
· h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} av =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

             apply pathsinv0, (bifunctor_equalwhiskers Mon_V).
          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
θ (t,, η)
  (alg_carrier
     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        I_{ Mon_V})
     (colimAlgInitial IV
        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
        (CV
           (initChain IV
              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                 H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))
· # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) · aτ
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) · aτ

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b = θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) · aτ

                     ((λ

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       c : V,

                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ

?b = θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) · aτ

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧

  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV

                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?f = θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?f = θ (t,, η) t · (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?f = θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)

                  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
PtdV ⟦ t,, η, av,, aη ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧

Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
h_ptd:= ?Goal1: PtdV ⟦ t,, η, av,, aη ⟧
?f = θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
pr2 (t,, η) -->[ h] pr2 (av,, aη)

                    exact auxη.
                  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
h_ptd:= h,, auxη: PtdV ⟦ t,, η, av,, aη ⟧
?f = θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)

                  apply (lineator_is_nattrans_full Mon_PtdV Act Act H
                           (lineator_linnatleft _ _ _ _ θ) (lineator_linnatright _ _ _ _ θ)_ _ _ _ h_ptd h). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
(h,, auxη) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ
· aτ

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b =
(h,, auxη) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ
· aτ

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH

                       (CV

                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b =
(h,, auxη) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
· (θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,

                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF

                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?t1 = θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ)

                  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)

                     ((λ

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       H CP c)

        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?t1 = θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ · aτ

                  apply pathsinv0, Hτ. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ) =
(h,, auxη) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
· (pr1 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (pr12 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
                   :
                   V
                   ⟦ H
                       (pr1
                          (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)),
                   pr1 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη) ⟧)
   · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
       (pr22 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
        :
        monoid Mon_V (pr1 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη))))

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ =
(h,, auxη) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
· pr1 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
· monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
    (pr22 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη))

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h =
(h,, auxη) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
· pr1 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V} # H h · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} aτ

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧

auxη: η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,

                       H CP c)

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV

                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b = h ⊗^{ Mon_V} # H h · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} aτ

Mon_V: monoidal V

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

                     ((λ

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} H t · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # H h
· av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} aτ

                  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} H t
· (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # H h · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} aτ)

                  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?t1 = av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # H h · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} aτ

                  apply (functor_comp (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V av)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
