  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} H t
· # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V av) (# H h · aτ)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} H t
· # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V av) (τ · h)

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV

                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h = ?b

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} H t
· # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V av) (τ · h)

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)

is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · functoronmorphisms2 Mon_V h h =
?b

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

                     ((λ

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ
· (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} h · h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} av) = ?b

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} h = ?f'

               apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V t)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
# (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V t) (τ · h)
· h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} av =
h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} H t
· # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V av) (τ · h)

             apply pathsinv0, (bifunctor_equalwhiskers Mon_V).
        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
pr11 Mendler_inst = μ · h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av θ
  aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) (μ · h)

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (μ · h) = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))) · 
(μ · h) =
θ (t,, η)
  (alg_carrier
     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        I_{ Mon_V})
     (colimAlgInitial IV
        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
        (CV
           (initChain IV
              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))) · 
# H (μ · h) · aτ

          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn1
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (μ · h) = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h) = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV

                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?b = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h

Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V

GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,

                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ = ?f'

               apply (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V (pr212 σ)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} · h = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h

             apply idpath.
          
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
(t,, η)
⊗^{ Act}_{l} (BinCoproductIn2
                (CP
                   (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
                   (H
                      (alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV
                               (initChain IV
                                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})))))))
              · alg_map
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (pr1
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))))
· (μ · h) =
θ (t,, η)
  (alg_carrier
     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H H CP
        I_{ Mon_V})
     (colimAlgInitial IV
        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
        (CV
           (initChain IV
              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                 H CP I_{ Mon_V}))))) · # H (μ · h)
· aτ
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h) =
θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h =
θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

?b = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

                     (colimAlgInitial

                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ = ?f'

               apply pathsinv0, (pr22 σ). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V

  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V

  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF

α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧

  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧

isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧

aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)

  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
pr1 θ
  (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ),,
   monoid_data_unit Mon_V
     (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
      :
      monoid Mon_V (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))))
  (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
· # H
    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
       (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
        :
        monoid Mon_V (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))))
· (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
   :
   V ⟦ H (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)), pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
   ⟧) · h = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
pr1 θ
  (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ),,
   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
  (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
· (# H
     (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
        (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
   · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)) =
θ (t,, η) t · (# H (μ · h) · aτ)

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
# H
  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
     (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
· (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h) = # H (μ · h) · aτ

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
# H
  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
     (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
· (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h) = ?b

  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
?f = # H (μ · h)

                  apply pathsinv0, functor_comp.

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH

  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)

                     ((λ

                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV

                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,

  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0

  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
     (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
· (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h) = # H μ · # H h · aτ

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
# H
  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
     (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
· (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h) = # H μ · (# H h · aτ)

             
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
auxτ: τ · h = # H h · aτ
auxη: η · h = aη
Mendler_inst:= SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
  (initial_annihilates t)
  (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ: ∃! h0 : V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial
                       IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH
                       I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       ((λ 
                       c : V,
                       GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP c)
                       I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧,
charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
  Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
  I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
  (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) h0
pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h = # H h · aτ

             exact auxτ.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
(λ cntr : SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ,
          av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧,
 ∏
 t : SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ,
     av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧, t = cntr)
  (h,,
   (let aux := pr21 It_inst in
    pr1 aux,,
    (((λ (auxτ : τ · pr11 It_inst =
                 # H (pr11 It_inst) · aτ)
       (auxη : η · pr11 It_inst = aη),
       let Mendler_inst :=
         SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
           Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
           I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
           (initial_annihilates t)
           (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ in
       path_to_ctr
         (V
          ⟦ (t,, η)
            ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                          H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                          (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                             CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                          (CV (...))), av ⟧)
         (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
            Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
            I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
         Mendler_inst (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
         (((internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...) (...)
              (...) (...) (...) @
            maponpaths (...) (pr12 Hμη)) @
           monoidal_rightunitornat Mon_V t av h),,
          (internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧)
             (... · ...) (... · aμ) (λ ..., ...)
             (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ... ... ...
                ...) (assoc ... ... aμ) @
           internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧)
             (... · aτ) (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
             (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ... ... ...
                ...) (assoc' ... ... aτ)) @
          cancel_postcomposition
            (... ⊗^{ Act} ... · θ ... av · # H aμ)
            (θ (...) t · # H (...)) aτ
            (internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
               (# H ...) (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
               (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ... ...
                  ... ...) (functor_comp H ... aμ))
          :
          charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
            Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
            I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
            (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)) @
       ! path_to_ctr
           (V
            ⟦ (t,, η)
              ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                         (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                            H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                         (colimAlgInitial IV
                            (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                               CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                            (CV (...))), av ⟧)
           (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
              Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
              I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
              (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
           (μ · h)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V
               ⟦ t
                 ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                              I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
              (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h))
              (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h)
              (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} ..., av ⟧,
               p = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
              (cancel_postcomposition (... · μ)
                 ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} h
                 (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V ...) @
               idpath (... · h))
              (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) μ h),,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
              (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h))
              (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h)
              (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} ..., av ⟧,
               p = ... · ... · aτ)
              (cancel_postcomposition (... · μ)
                 (... · ...) h (! pr22 σ) @
               internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧)
                 (... · h) (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ... ...
                    ... ...) (assoc' ... ... h))
              (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) μ h)
            :
            charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
              Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
              I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
              (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h) (μ · h)))
        (pr1 aux) (pr2 aux)
      :
      is_monoid_mor_mult Mon_V (pr212 σ)
        (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) h),,
     (pr2 aux
      :
      is_monoid_mor_unit Mon_V (pr212 σ)
        (pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)) h)
     :
     pr212 σ -->[
