     h] pr212 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ))),,
   tt)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
∏
t0 : SigmaMonoid θ ⟦ σ,
     av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ ⟧,
t0 =
h,,
(let aux := pr21 It_inst in
 pr1 aux,,
 (let Mendler_inst :=
    SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
      Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av
      θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
      (initial_annihilates t)
      (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ in
  path_to_ctr
    (V
     ⟦ (t,, η)
       ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (colimAlgInitial IV
                     (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                        CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                     (CV
                        (initChain IV
                           (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                              H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), av
     ⟧)
    (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
       Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}
       av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
    (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
    (((internal_paths_rew_r
         (V
          ⟦ t
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         t, av ⟧)
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
         (λ p : V
                ⟦ t
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                               I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
          p =
          h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
          · (av
             ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...
             · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V (...)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧)
            (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · (av
                ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                                 ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (...)))
            (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · av
               ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                                (...)
             · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (aμ,, aη))
            (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧,
             t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ =
             p)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · av
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit
                                   Mon_V ...)
               (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                  (aμ,, aη))
               (internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                  (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                  (functoronmorphisms2 Mon_V h h)
                  (λ ..., ...)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ...
                     ... ... ...)
                  (bifunctor_equalwhiskers Mon_V t av
                     t av h h)))
            (assoc (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V})
               (av
                ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                                 (...))
               (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                  (aμ,, aη))))
         (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
            aμ) @
       maponpaths
         (compose (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}))
         (pr12 Hμη)) @
      monoidal_rightunitornat Mon_V t av h),,
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
        (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
        (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
        (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
         p =
         (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
         · (pr1 (...) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...)
            · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                (pr22 (...))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
            pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...,, Hμη) ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 (...)
               ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 (...))))
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · pr1 (av,, ...)
              ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...)
            · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                (pr22 (av,, aτ,, ...)))
           (λ p : V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
                  pr1 (av,, ...) ⟧,
            t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ =
            p)
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · pr1 (...)
                 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...))
              (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (pr22 (av,, ...)))
              (internal_paths_rew (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧)
                 (τ · h) (λ ..., ...) (... @ ! ...)
                 (... · aτ) (pr1 aux) @
               internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                 (... · ...) (... · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                 (maponpaths ... ...)
                 (assoc' ... ... ...)))
           (assoc ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
              (pr1 (av,, ...)
               ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...))
              (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (pr22 (av,, ...)))))
        (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
           aμ) @
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
        ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av
         · # H aμ · aτ)
        ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av
         · (# H aμ · aτ))
        (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
         (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
         · (pr1 (...) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...)
            · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                (pr22 (...))) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ)))
           (λ p : V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧,
            (h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 ...
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V ...) =
            p)
           (maponpaths
              (compose ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ ... ⊗_{ Act} ..., av ⟧)
                 (θ ... av · (...)) (... · ... · aτ)
                 (λ p : ..., ... = p) (! Hτ)
                 (assoc (...) (...) aτ)))
           (assoc' ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
              (θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ · aτ)))
        (assoc'
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ) aτ)) @
     cancel_postcomposition
       ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av
        · # H aμ)
       (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)) aτ
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧)
          (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
          (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ)
          (λ p : V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧,
           (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
           · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ = θ (t,, η) t · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V
              ⟦ (t,, η)
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} H t, H av ⟧)
             (θ (t,, η) t
              · (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ))
             (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
              · # H aμ)
             (λ p : V
                    ⟦ (t,, η)
                      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                            (...) (...) (...)} H t,
                    H av ⟧,
              (...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (...) av
              · # H aμ = p)
             (cancel_postcomposition
                ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
                 · θ (av,, aη) av)
                (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h))
                (# H aμ)
                (let h_ptd := h,, pr2 aux in
                 lineator_is_nattrans_full Mon_PtdV
                   Act Act H
                   (lineator_linnatleft ... ... ... H
                      θ)
                   (lineator_linnatright ... ... ... H
                      θ) (t,, η) (av,, aη) t av h_ptd
                   h))
             (assoc (θ (t,, η) t)
                (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)) (# H aμ)))
          (functor_comp H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ))) @
  ! path_to_ctr
      (V
       ⟦ (t,, η)
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                          CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                          (initChain IV
                             (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
       av ⟧)
      (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
         Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}
         av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
      (μ · h)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (V
          ⟦ t
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         t, av ⟧)
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h))
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h)
         (λ p : V
                ⟦ t
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                               I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
          p = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
         (cancel_postcomposition
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ)
            ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} h
            (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V (pr212 σ)) @
          idpath (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
         (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) μ h),,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h))
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h)
         (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
          p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
         (cancel_postcomposition
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ)
            (pr1 θ
               (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ),,
                monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 (...)))
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
             · # H
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...,, pr12 σ)))
             · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h (! pr22 σ) @
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)), av
             ⟧)
            (pr1 θ
               (pr1 (...),,
                monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
               (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
             · # H
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))
             · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)
            (pr1 θ
               (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ),,
                monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 (...)))
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
             · # H
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...,, pr12 σ)))
             · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (...)), av ⟧,
             p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (...)), av ⟧)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 ...,,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                  (pr1 (...))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 ...))
                · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · (# H
                     (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                        ...) · (pr12 (...) · h)))
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ pr1 (...) ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (...),
                      av ⟧,
                p = θ (...) t · # H (...) · aτ)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ (t,, η)
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (...) (...) (...)} H t, av
                   ⟧) (θ (...) t · # H (...) · aτ)
                  (θ (t,, η) t · (# H ... · aτ))
                  (λ p : V ⟦ ... ⊗_{ ...} ..., av ⟧,
                   pr1 θ ... ... · (...) = p)
                  (maponpaths (compose (...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ...
                        ... ... ... @
                      cancel_postcomposition ... ...
                        aτ ...))
                  (assoc' (θ (...) t) (# H (...)) aτ))
               (assoc'
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...)))
                  (# H
                     (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                        (pr22 ...)))
                  (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)))
            (assoc'
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...))))
               (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h))
         (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) μ h))),, pr2 aux),,
tt

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
ah: V ⟦ pr1 σ, pr1 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
⟧
Hyp: pr2 σ -->[
ah] pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
ah,, Hyp =
h,,
(let aux := pr21 It_inst in
 pr1 aux,,
 (let Mendler_inst :=
    SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
      Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av
      θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
      (initial_annihilates t)
      (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ in
  path_to_ctr
    (V
     ⟦ (t,, η)
       ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                  (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                     H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                  (colimAlgInitial IV
                     (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                        CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                     (CV
                        (initChain IV
                           (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                              H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), av
     ⟧)
    (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
       Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}
       av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
    (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
    (((internal_paths_rew_r
         (V
          ⟦ t
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         t, av ⟧)
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
         (λ p : V
                ⟦ t
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                               I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
          p =
          h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
          · (av
             ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                              (...)
             · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (aμ,, aη)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧)
            (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · (av
                ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                                 (...)
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (aμ,, aη)))
            (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · av
               ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                                (aμ,, aη)
             · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (aμ,, aη))
            (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧,
             t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ =
             p)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · av
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit
                                   Mon_V (...))
               (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                  (aμ,, aη))
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t,
                   av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av ⟧)
                  (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                  (functoronmorphisms2 Mon_V h h)
                  (λ p : ..., ... = ...)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                     (...) (...) (...) (...))
                  (bifunctor_equalwhiskers Mon_V t av
                     t av h h)))
            (assoc (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V})
               (av
                ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                                 (aμ,, aη))
               (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                  (aμ,, aη))))
         (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
            aμ) @
       maponpaths
         (compose (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}))
         (pr12 Hμη)) @
      monoidal_rightunitornat Mon_V t av h),,
     (internal_paths_rew_r
        (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
        (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
        (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
        (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
         p =
         (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
         · (pr1 (av,, ...)
            ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...)
            · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                (pr22 (av,, ...))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
            pr1 (av,, aτ,, (...),, Hμη) ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 (av,, ...)
               ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 (av,, ...))))
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...)
              ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...,, Hμη)
            · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                (pr22 (av,, aτ,, ...,, Hμη)))
           (λ p : V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
                  pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...) ⟧,
            t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ =
            p)
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · pr1 (av,, ...)
                 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...))
              (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (pr22 (av,, aτ,, ...)))
              (internal_paths_rew (V ⟦ H t, av ⟧)
                 (τ · h) (λ p : ..., ... = ...)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r ... ... ... ...
                    ... ... @
                  ! bifunctor_equalwhiskers Mon_V t av
                      ... av h ...) (# H h · aτ)
                 (pr1 aux) @
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} ...,
                  av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av ⟧)
                 (... · ... · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} aτ)
                 (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} ... · (...))
                 (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                 (maponpaths (...) (...))
                 (assoc' (...) (...) (...))))
           (assoc ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
              (pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...)
               ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,,
                                    aτ,, ...,, Hμη))
              (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                 (pr22 (av,, aτ,, ...)))))
        (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
           aμ) @
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
        ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av
         · # H aμ · aτ)
        ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av
         · (# H aμ · aτ))
        (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
         (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
         · (pr1 (av,, ...)
            ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, aτ,, ...)
            · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                (pr22 (av,, ...))) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ)))
           (λ p : V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧,
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)) = p)
           (maponpaths
              (compose ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (V ⟦ (...) ⊗_{ Act} H av, av ⟧)
                 (θ (...) av · (... · aτ))
                 (θ ... av · # H aμ · aτ)
                 (λ p : V ⟦ ..., av ⟧, ... · ... = p)
                 (! Hτ) (assoc (θ ... av) (# H aμ) aτ)))
           (assoc' ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
              (θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ · aτ)))
        (assoc'
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ) aτ)) @
     cancel_postcomposition
       ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (av,, aη) av
        · # H aμ)
       (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)) aτ
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧)
          (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
          (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ)
          (λ p : V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧,
           (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
           · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ = θ (t,, η) t · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V
              ⟦ (t,, η)
                ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                      (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                         Mon_V)
                      (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                      (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                         Mon_V)} H t, H av ⟧)
             (θ (t,, η) t
              · (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ))
             (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
              · # H aμ)
             (λ p : V
                    ⟦ (t,, η)
                      ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                            (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                               Mon_V)
                            (monoidal_pointed_objects
                               Mon_V)
                            (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                               Mon_V)} H t, H av ⟧,
              (h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
              · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ = p)
             (cancel_postcomposition
                ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
                 · θ (av,, aη) av)
                (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h))
                (# H aμ)
                (let h_ptd := h,, pr2 aux in
                 lineator_is_nattrans_full Mon_PtdV
                   Act Act H
                   (lineator_linnatleft (...) (...)
                      (...) H θ)
                   (lineator_linnatright (...) (...)
                      (...) H θ) (t,, η) (av,, aη) t
                   av h_ptd h))
             (assoc (θ (t,, η) t)
                (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)) (# H aμ)))
          (functor_comp H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ))) @
  ! path_to_ctr
      (V
       ⟦ (t,, η)
         ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                    (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                    (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                          CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                          (initChain IV
                             (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
       av ⟧)
      (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
         Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}
         av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
      (μ · h)
      (internal_paths_rew_r
         (V
          ⟦ t
            ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V}
                         t, av ⟧)
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h))
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h)
         (λ p : V
                ⟦ t
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                               I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
          p = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
         (cancel_postcomposition
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ)
            ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} h
            (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V (pr212 σ)) @
          idpath (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
         (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) μ h),,
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h))
         (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h)
         (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
          p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
         (cancel_postcomposition
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ)
            (pr1 θ
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ),,
                monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                  (pr22 (...,, pr12 σ)))
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
             · # H
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
             · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h (! pr22 σ) @
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)), av
             ⟧)
            (pr1 θ
               (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ),,
                monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 (...)))
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
             · # H
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...,, pr12 σ)))
             · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)
            (pr1 θ
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ),,
                monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                  (pr22 (...,, pr12 σ)))
               (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
             · # H
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)))
             · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)),
                   av ⟧,
             p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)),
                av ⟧)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 (...)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
                · (# H
                     (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                        (pr22 ...))
                   · (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h)))
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                        ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 ...), av ⟧,
                p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ (t,, η)
                     ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                           (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                              Mon_V)
                           (monoidal_pointed_objects
                              Mon_V)
                           (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                              Mon_V)} H t, av ⟧)
                  (θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
                  (θ (t,, η) t · (# H (...) · aτ))
                  (λ p : V
                         ⟦ (...)
                           ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory
                                 Mon_V ... ... ...} 
                           H t, av ⟧,
                   pr1 θ (...) (...) · (... · ...) = p)
                  (maponpaths (compose (θ ... t))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                        (...) (...) (...) (...) @
                      cancel_postcomposition (...)
                        (...) aτ (! ...)))
                  (assoc' (θ (t,, η) t) (# H (μ · h))
                     aτ))
               (assoc'
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 (...),,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V
                        (pr22 ...))
                     (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)))
                  (# H
                     (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                        (pr22 (...))))
                  (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)))
            (assoc'
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 (...)))
                  (pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...,, pr12 σ))))
               (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h))
         (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) μ h))),, pr2 aux),,
tt

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
ah: V ⟦ pr1 σ, pr1 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
⟧
Hyp: pr2 σ -->[
ah] pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
pr1 (ah,, Hyp) =
pr1
  (h,,
   (let aux := pr21 It_inst in
    pr1 aux,,
    (let Mendler_inst :=
       SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
         Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}
         av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
         (initial_annihilates t)
         (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ in
     path_to_ctr
       (V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                        H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧)
       (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
          Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
          I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
       Mendler_inst (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
       (((internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ t
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                            I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η
             · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ t
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                                  I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
             p =
             h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V ...))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...
                   · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       ...))
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · av
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit
                                   Mon_V ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (aμ,, aη))
               (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av
                      ⟧, ... · ... · aμ = p)
               (cancel_postcomposition
                  (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                  (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                   · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...)
                  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                     (...))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                     (...) (...) (...) (...)))
               (assoc (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V})
                  (av
                   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit
                                    Mon_V ...)
                  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                     (...))))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ) @
          maponpaths
            (compose (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}))
            (pr12 Hμη)) @
         monoidal_rightunitornat Mon_V t av h),,
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
           (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
           (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
           (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
            p =
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
               pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...) ⟧)
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
                  · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                      (pr22 ...)))
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · pr1 (...)
                 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 (av,, ...)))
              (λ p : V ⟦ (...) ⊗_{ Act} H t, pr1 (...)
                     ⟧,
               t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h
               · aμ = p)
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                 ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
                  · pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...))
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew (...) (...) (...)
                    (...) (...) (...) @
                  internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                    (...) (...) (...) (...)))
              (assoc ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
                 (pr1 (...)
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...))
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))))
           (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ)
              (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ) @
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ · aτ)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))
           (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)) = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧)
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · (θ (...) av · (... · aτ)))
              (λ p : V ⟦ (...) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧,
               (...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · (... · ...) = p)
              (maponpaths (compose (... ⊗^{ Act} ...))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧)
                    (... · ...) (... · aτ)
                    (λ ..., ...) (! Hτ)
                    (assoc ... ... aτ)))
              (assoc' ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
                 (θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ · aτ)))
           (assoc'
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ) aτ)) @
        cancel_postcomposition
          ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
           · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ)
          (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)) aτ
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧)
             (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
             (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ)
             (λ p : V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧,
              (h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
              · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ =
              θ (t,, η) t · p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ (t,, η)
                   ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                         (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                            Mon_V)
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)
                         (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                            Mon_V)} H t, H av ⟧)
                (θ (t,, η) t · (# H (...) · # H aμ))
                (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                 · # H aμ)
                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ (...)
                         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                               ... ... ...} H t, H av
                       ⟧,
                 ... ⊗^{ Act} ... · θ ... av · # H aμ =
                 p)
                (cancel_postcomposition
                   ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (...) av)
                   (θ (...) t · # H (...)) (# H aμ)
                   (let h_ptd := h,, ... in
                    lineator_is_nattrans_full Mon_PtdV
                      Act Act H (...) (...) (...)
                      (...) t av h_ptd h))
                (assoc (θ (t,, η) t)
                   (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)) (# H aμ)))
             (functor_comp H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ))) @
     ! path_to_ctr
         (V
          ⟦ (t,, η)
            ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                          H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                          (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                             CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                          (CV
                             (initChain IV
                                (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                   H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
          av ⟧)
         (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
            Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
            I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
         Mendler_inst (μ · h)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ t
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                            I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ t
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                                  I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
             p = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ)
               ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} h
               (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V
                  (pr212 σ)) @
             idpath (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) μ h),,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h)
            (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
             p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h (! pr22 σ) @
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)),
                av ⟧)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 ...,,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                  (pr1 (...))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 ...))
                · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                        ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 ...), av ⟧,
                p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 ...), av ⟧)
                  (pr1 θ (...,, ...) (pr1 ...)
                   · # H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                          Mon_V ...)
                   · (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h))
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...))
                   · (# H (...) · (pr12 ... · h)))
                  (λ p : V ⟦ pr1 ... ⊗_{ Mon_V} H ...,
                         av ⟧,
                   p = θ ... t · # H ... · aτ)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V
                      ⟦ (...)
                        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                              ... ... ...} H t, av ⟧)
                     (θ ... t · # H ... · aτ)
                     (θ (...) t · (... · aτ))
                     (λ p : V ⟦ ..., av ⟧,
                      ... · ... = p)
                     (maponpaths (compose ...)
                        (... @ ...))
                     (assoc' (θ ... t) (# H ...) aτ))
                  (assoc'
                     (pr1 θ (...,, ...) (pr1 ...))
                     (# H
                        (monoid_data_multiplication
                           Mon_V ...))
                     (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h)))
               (assoc'
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...))
                   · # H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                          Mon_V (pr22 ...)))
                  (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) μ h))),,
    pr2 aux),, tt)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
ah: V ⟦ pr1 σ, pr1 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
⟧
Hyp: pr2 σ -->[
ah] pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 σ)
     (pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ))) 
  ?p (pr2 (ah,, Hyp)) =
pr2
  (h,,
   (let aux := pr21 It_inst in
    pr1 aux,,
    (let Mendler_inst :=
       SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
         Mon_PtdV IV CV Act 
         (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
         (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
         (initial_annihilates t)
         (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ in
     path_to_ctr
       (V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), av ⟧)
       (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
          Mon_PtdV IV CV Act 
          (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
          (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
       (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
       (((internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ t
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
               constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η
             · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ t
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
                     constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t,
                   av ⟧,
             p =
             h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V ...))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...
                   · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       ...))
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · av
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} 
                  monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (aμ,, aη))
               (λ p : V ⟦ 
                      t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧,
                ... · ... · aμ = p)
               (cancel_postcomposition
                  (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                  (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                   · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...)
                  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                     (...))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r 
                     (...) 
                     (...) 
                     (...) 
                     (...) 
                     (...) 
                     (...)))
               (assoc (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V})
                  (av
                   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} 
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                     (...))))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ) @
          maponpaths
            (compose (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}))
            (pr12 Hμη)) @
         monoidal_rightunitornat Mon_V t av h),,
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
           (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
           (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
           (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
            p =
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
               pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...) ⟧)
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
                  · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                      (pr22 ...)))
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · pr1 (...)
                 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 
                 (av,, ...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 (av,, ...)))
              (λ p : V ⟦ 
                     (...) ⊗_{ Act} H t, 
                     pr1 (...) ⟧,
               t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h
               · aμ = p)
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                 ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
                  · pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...))
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) @
                  internal_paths_rew_r 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...) 
                    (...)))
              (assoc ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
                 (pr1 (...)
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 
                  (av,, ...))
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))))
           (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ)
              (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ) @
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · 
            # H aμ · aτ)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · 
            (# H aμ · aτ))
           (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)) = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧)
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · θ (av,, aη) av · 
               (# H aμ · aτ))
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · (θ (...) av · (... · aτ)))
              (λ p : V ⟦ (...) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧,
               (...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · (... · ...) = p)
              (maponpaths 
                 (compose (... ⊗^{ Act} ...))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r 
                    (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧) 
                    (... · ...) 
                    (... · aτ) 
                    (λ ..., ...) 
                    (! Hτ) 
                    (assoc ... ... aτ)))
              (assoc' ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
                 (θ (av,, aη) av) 
                 (# H aμ · aτ)))
           (assoc'
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · θ (av,, aη) av) 
              (# H aμ) aτ)) @
        cancel_postcomposition
          ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
           · θ (av,, aη) av · 
           # H aμ)
          (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)) aτ
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧)
             (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
             (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ)
             (λ p : V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧,
              (h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
              · θ (av,, aη) av · 
              # H aμ = θ (t,, η) t · p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ (t,, η)
                   ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                       (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                       Mon_V)
                       (monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_V)
                       (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                       Mon_V)} 
                   H t, 
                 H av ⟧)
                (θ (t,, η) t · (# H (...) · # H aμ))
                (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                 · # H aμ)
                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ 
                       (...)
                       ⊗_{ 
                       reindexed_actegory Mon_V ...
                       ... ...} 
                       H t, 
                       H av ⟧,
                 ... ⊗^{ Act} ... · θ ... av · # H aμ =
                 p)
                (cancel_postcomposition
                   ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (...) av)
                   (θ (...) t · # H (...)) 
                   (# H aμ)
                   (let h_ptd := h,, ... in
                    lineator_is_nattrans_full Mon_PtdV
                      Act Act H 
                      (...) 
                      (...) 
                      (...) 
                      (...) t av h_ptd h))
                (assoc (θ (t,, η) t)
                   (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)) 
                   (# H aμ)))
             (functor_comp H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ))) @
     ! path_to_ctr
         (V
          ⟦ (t,, η)
            ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                       (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                       CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                       (CV
                       (initChain IV
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                       H CP I_{ Mon_V})))), av ⟧)
         (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
            Mon_PtdV IV CV Act 
            (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ
            (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)) Mendler_inst
         (μ · h)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ t
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
               constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ t
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
                     constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t,
                   av ⟧, 
             p = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ)
               ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} h
               (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V
                  (pr212 σ)) @
             idpath (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) μ h),,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h)
            (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
             p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h 
               (! pr22 σ) @
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
                  H (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)), av ⟧)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 ...,,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                  (pr1 (...))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 ...))
                · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ 
                      pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                      ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
                      H (pr1 ...), av ⟧,
                p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} 
                     H (pr1 ...), av ⟧)
                  (pr1 θ (...,, ...) (pr1 ...)
                   · # H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                       Mon_V ...)
                   · (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h))
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...))
                   · (# H (...) · (pr12 ... · h)))
                  (λ p : 
                      V ⟦ 
                      pr1 ... ⊗_{ Mon_V} H ..., av ⟧,
                   p = θ ... t · # H ... · aτ)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V
                      ⟦ 
                      (...)
                      ⊗_{ 
                      reindexed_actegory Mon_V ... ...
                       ...} 
                      H t, av ⟧)
                     (θ ... t · # H ... · aτ)
                     (θ (...) t · (... · aτ))
                     (λ 
                      p : V ⟦ ..., av ⟧, 
                      ... · ... = p)
                     (maponpaths 
                       (compose ...) 
                       (... @ ...))
                     (assoc' (θ ... t) (# H ...) aτ))
                  (assoc'
                     (pr1 θ (...,, ...) (pr1 ...))
                     (# H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                       Mon_V ...))
                     (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h)))
               (assoc'
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...))
                   · # H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                       Mon_V 
                       (pr22 ...)))
                  (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) μ h))),,
    pr2 aux),, tt)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
ah: V ⟦ pr1 σ, pr1 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
⟧
Hyp: pr2 σ -->[
ah] pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
pr1 (ah,, Hyp) =
pr1
  (h,,
   (let aux := pr21 It_inst in
    pr1 aux,,
    (let Mendler_inst :=
       SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
         Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}
         av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
         (initial_annihilates t)
         (left_whiskering_omega_cocont t) δ in
     path_to_ctr
       (V
        ⟦ (t,, η)
          ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                     (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                        H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                     (colimAlgInitial IV
                        (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                           CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                        (CV
                           (initChain IV
                              (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                 H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
        av ⟧)
       (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
          Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
          I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
       Mendler_inst (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
       (((internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ t
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                            I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η
             · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ t
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                                  I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
             p =
             h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
             · (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V ...))
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · (av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...
                   · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       ...))
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                · av
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit
                                   Mon_V ...
                · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (aμ,, aη))
               (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} I_{ Mon_V}, av
                      ⟧, ... · ... · aμ = p)
               (cancel_postcomposition
                  (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                  (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
                   · av ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ...)
                  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                     (...))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                     (...) (...) (...) (...)))
               (assoc (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V})
                  (av
                   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} monoid_data_unit
                                    Mon_V ...)
                  (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                     (...))))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η)
               (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ) @
          maponpaths
            (compose (h ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}))
            (pr12 Hμη)) @
         monoidal_rightunitornat Mon_V t av h),,
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
           (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
           (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)
           (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
            p =
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t,
               pr1 (av,, aτ,, ...) ⟧)
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
                  · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                      (pr22 ...)))
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · pr1 (...)
                 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 (av,, ...)))
              (λ p : V ⟦ (...) ⊗_{ Act} H t, pr1 (...)
                     ⟧,
               t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h
               · aμ = p)
              (cancel_postcomposition
                 (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                 ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
                  · pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...))
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))
                 (internal_paths_rew (...) (...) (...)
                    (...) (...) (...) @
                  internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                    (...) (...) (...) (...)))
              (assoc ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
                 (pr1 (...)
                  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (av,, ...))
                 (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                    (pr22 (...)))))
           (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ)
              (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ) @
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ · aτ)
           ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))
           (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
            (h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
            · (pr1 ... ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr12 (...)
               · monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                   (pr22 ...)) = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (V ⟦ (t,, η) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧)
              ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · θ (av,, aη) av · (# H aμ · aτ))
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · (θ (...) av · (... · aτ)))
              (λ p : V ⟦ (...) ⊗_{ Act} H t, av ⟧,
               (...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · (... · ...) = p)
              (maponpaths (compose (... ⊗^{ Act} ...))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r (V ⟦ ..., av ⟧)
                    (... · ...) (... · aτ)
                    (λ ..., ...) (! Hτ)
                    (assoc ... ... aτ)))
              (assoc' ((h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h)
                 (θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ · aτ)))
           (assoc'
              ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
               · θ (av,, aη) av) (# H aμ) aτ)) @
        cancel_postcomposition
          ((h,, pr2 aux) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
           · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ)
          (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ)) aτ
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧)
             (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h · aμ))
             (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) · # H aμ)
             (λ p : V ⟦ H (t ⊗_{ Mon_V} t), H av ⟧,
              (h,, ...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h
              · θ (av,, aη) av · # H aμ =
              θ (t,, η) t · p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (V
                 ⟦ (t,, η)
                   ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                         (actegory_with_canonical_self_action
                            Mon_V)
                         (monoidal_pointed_objects
                            Mon_V)
                         (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal
                            Mon_V)} H t, H av ⟧)
                (θ (t,, η) t · (# H (...) · # H aμ))
                (θ (t,, η) t · # H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)
                 · # H aμ)
                (λ p : V
                       ⟦ (...)
                         ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                               ... ... ...} H t, H av
                       ⟧,
                 ... ⊗^{ Act} ... · θ ... av · # H aμ =
                 p)
                (cancel_postcomposition
                   ((...) ⊗^{ Act} # H h · θ (...) av)
                   (θ (...) t · # H (...)) (# H aμ)
                   (let h_ptd := h,, ... in
                    lineator_is_nattrans_full Mon_PtdV
                      Act Act H (...) (...) (...)
                      (...) t av h_ptd h))
                (assoc (θ (t,, η) t)
                   (# H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h)) (# H aμ)))
             (functor_comp H (h ⊗^{ Mon_V} h) aμ))) @
     ! path_to_ctr
         (V
          ⟦ (t,, η)
            ⊗_{ Act} alg_carrier
                       (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                          H CP I_{ Mon_V})
                       (colimAlgInitial IV
                          (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
                             CP H HH I_{ Mon_V})
                          (CV
                             (initChain IV
                                (GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
                                   H CP I_{ Mon_V})))),
          av ⟧)
         (charprop_SpecialGenMendlerIterationWithActegoryAndStrength
            Mon_PtdV IV CV Act (t,, η) CP H HH
            I_{ Mon_V} av θ aτ (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
         Mendler_inst (μ · h)
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (V
             ⟦ t
               ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                            I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · (μ · h))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ · h)
            (λ p : V
                   ⟦ t
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} constant_functor V V
                                  I_{ Mon_V} t, av ⟧,
             p = ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η · μ)
               ru^{ Mon_V }_{ pr1 σ} h
               (monoid_to_unit_right_law Mon_V
                  (pr212 σ)) @
             idpath (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ t} · h))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} η) μ h),,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧)
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · (μ · h))
            (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ · h)
            (λ p : V ⟦ t ⊗_{ Mon_V} H t, av ⟧,
             p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
            (cancel_postcomposition
               (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ · μ)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h (! pr22 σ) @
             internal_paths_rew_r
               (V
                ⟦ pr1 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)
                  ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)),
                av ⟧)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 ...,,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                  (pr1 (...))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 ...))
                · pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h)
               (pr1 θ
                  (pr1 (...),,
                   monoid_data_unit Mon_V (pr22 ...))
                  (pr1 (...,, pr12 σ))
                · # H
                    (monoid_data_multiplication Mon_V
                       (pr22 (...)))
                · (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ) · h))
               (λ p : V
                      ⟦ pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                        ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 ...), av ⟧,
                p = θ (t,, η) t · # H (μ · h) · aτ)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (V
                   ⟦ pr1 (...,, pr12 σ)
                     ⊗_{ Mon_V} H (pr1 ...), av ⟧)
                  (pr1 θ (...,, ...) (pr1 ...)
                   · # H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                          Mon_V ...)
                   · (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h))
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...))
                   · (# H (...) · (pr12 ... · h)))
                  (λ p : V ⟦ pr1 ... ⊗_{ Mon_V} H ...,
                         av ⟧,
                   p = θ ... t · # H ... · aτ)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (V
                      ⟦ (...)
                        ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V
                              ... ... ...} H t, av ⟧)
                     (θ ... t · # H ... · aτ)
                     (θ (...) t · (... · aτ))
                     (λ p : V ⟦ ..., av ⟧,
                      ... · ... = p)
                     (maponpaths (compose ...)
                        (... @ ...))
                     (assoc' (θ ... t) (# H ...) aτ))
                  (assoc'
                     (pr1 θ (...,, ...) (pr1 ...))
                     (# H
                        (monoid_data_multiplication
                           Mon_V ...))
                     (pr12 (...,, pr12 σ) · h)))
               (assoc'
                  (pr1 θ
                     (pr1 ...,,
                      monoid_data_unit Mon_V ...)
                     (pr1 (...))
                   · # H
                       (monoid_data_multiplication
                          Mon_V (pr22 ...)))
                  (pr12 (pr1 σ,, pr12 σ)) h))
            (assoc (t ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} τ) μ h))),,
    pr2 aux),, tt)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
isInitial V (v ⊗_{ Mon_V} IV)
left_whiskering_omega_cocont: ∏ v : V,
is_omega_cocont
  (leftwhiskering_functor
     Mon_V v)
σ:= mhss_to_sigma_monoid θ initial_alg_to_mhss: SigmaMonoid θ
μ:= pr112 (pr12 σ): V ⟦ pr1 σ ⊗_{ Mon_V} pr1 σ, pr1 σ ⟧
av: V
aτ: algebra_disp_cat H av
aμ: V ⟦ av ⊗_{ Mon_V} av, av ⟧
aη: V ⟦ I_{ Mon_V}, av ⟧
Hμη: monoid_laws Mon_V (aμ,, aη)
Hτ: SigmaMonoid_compatibility θ
  (av,, aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη)
It_inst:= Iteration_I_H av aη aτ: ∃! h : V ⟦ t, av ⟧,
τ · h = # H h · aτ × η · h = aη
h:= pr11 It_inst: V ⟦ t, av ⟧
ah: V ⟦ pr1 σ, pr1 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
⟧
Hyp: pr2 σ -->[
ah] pr2 (av,, (aτ,, (aμ,, aη),, Hμη),, Hτ)
τ · pr1 (ah,, Hyp) = # H (pr1 (ah,, Hyp)) · aτ
× η · pr1 (ah,, Hyp) = aη

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
H: V ⟶ V
θ: pointedtensorialstrength Mon_V H
PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.PtdV Mon_V: category
Mon_PtdV:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Mon_PtdV
  Mon_V: monoidal PtdV
Act:= GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Act Mon_V: actegory Mon_PtdV V
CP: BinCoproducts V
δ: actegory_bincoprod_distributor Mon_PtdV CP Act
Const_plus_H:= λ v : V,
GeneralizedSubstitutionSystems.Const_plus_H
  H CP v: V → V ⟶ V
IV: Initial V
CV: Colims_of_shape nat_graph V
HH: is_omega_cocont H
AF:= FunctorAlg I_H: category
chnF:= initChain IV I_H: chain V
t_Initial:= colimAlgInitial IV
  (ActionScenarioForGenMendlerIteration_alt.HF
     CP H HH I_{ Mon_V}) 
  (CV chnF): Initial AF
t:= alg_carrier I_H t_Initial: V
α:= alg_map I_H (pr1 t_Initial): V ⟦ I_H t, t ⟧
η:= BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t, t ⟧
τ:= BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (constant_functor V V I_{ Mon_V} t) (H t))
· α: V ⟦ H t, t ⟧
initial_annihilates: ∏ v : V,
